milestoneTitle: Phase M9.19a — Learn list migrated to the unified .dash-tile grammar. Phase 2 begins: the same component that powers Dashboard preview tiles now renders the Learn list (Up Next / Everything else / Done zones), with all Learn-specific features wired through the same fixed-slot geometry. New optional rows added to .dash-tile: .dash-tile-summary (1-line ellipsis description), .dash-tile-flags (reserved slot for future warning/locked/new/recommended/has-notes indicators — currently emits nothing but the layout is locked), .dash-tile-coverage (drafts-only pills showing N lessons · N courses · N snippets · N videos). Sortable variant: .dash-tile[data-sortable='1'] makes the 28px leading grab column visible + interactive (cursor: grab, touch-action: none). Drag state ported from retired .learn-item-is-dragging to .dash-tile.is-dragging (same scale(1.04) + elevation shadow + entry pulse). renderLearnItemRow rewritten to emit .dash-tile markup; renderLearn's post-render wiring now targets .dash-tile + .dash-tile-grab + data-sortable='1'. wireLearnGrabHandle walks up via .closest('.dash-tile') instead of flex-sibling nextElementSibling; drop-commit reads title via .dash-tile-title. Click-to-navigate: lessons open modal, courses open external URL new-tab, drafts open docsUrl if present else modal. Retained: all M9.17 behavior (drag-trace finger-follow, two-tap delete on drafts, inline pin/mastery via global [data-learn-action] delegation). Old .learn-item CSS left dormant for rollback; retires in M9.19b after phone review. Dashboard preview tiles unchanged (don't emit data-sortable, don't emit summary/flags/coverage — same compact markup).
